title: Facecraft
description: Facecraft, a cursed mod that's always watching
body:
# This is Face Craft Legacy
Face Craft is a cursed mod that adds faces, tons of them. Explore the world to find the Facelands, a biome covered in faces. Journey underground to mine faces from stone. Discover the scary Face Demon, and Much More!
 <iframe width="420" height="315"
src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/jmW2NnVKXhw">
</iframe>
